text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm out observing things at the training track
when I notice Agnes Digital doing the same.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh, how I love watching my Umas do partner
runs! Look at them wordlessly communicating with
their gazes!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
"It's because of you that I was able to surpass my
own limits!"

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
"Come! Chase after me and catch me! I know you
can do it!"

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And who comes running after her but her dearest
friend and rival! Oooh! What unrestrained
passion!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Bravo! That was a splendid etude of yours!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Eeek! O-Opera O?! Wh-wh-what are you doing
here?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Curse myself for failing to blend into the wall!
And worse, I've been overheard fangirling about
my oshis!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
My word, your skill at improv theater is
phenomenal! Digital, would you be interested in
taking the stage with me?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
There, we will project our voices together in
operatic song, spreading word of my great deeds
as Overlord throughout the world!

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text: Uh-oh, Opera O's got another one cornered...

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text:
I heard she made a girl in the class next to ours
perform her original opera for eight hours
straight...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
A moment, if you please. I also have business with
Digital... as she is an important subject of my
ongoing observations.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what?! Tachyon too?! And... wow, did you
just call me important?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I am currently studying the mechanism by which
she transforms her passion for Umamusume into
power.

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Tachyon's joined in too!

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text:
I heard she made a student in the class next to
ours participate in some really terrifying
experiment...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Digital, why do you hesitate? Come! Take my
hand at once!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I've already prepared the laboratory for my
experiment, and I'd like to start testing my
hypotheses as soon as possible.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Wh-wh-what should I do? Ohhh, this is terrible...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Being forced to choose between the lesser of two
evils, Agnes Digital appears understandably
conflicted.
choice_data_list:
It's okay to say no if you don't want to do either
one.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Who said I don't want to do what they're
asking me?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Sharing a stage with Opera O and being a test
subject for Tachyon are both dreams come true!
choice_data_list: Then why are you so upset?
Then why are you so upset?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Because I don't know if I'm worthy of such
important tasks!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Can I truly live up to my oshis' expectations? No
matter how much research I do, I'm scared to find
out!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Both Opera O and Tachyon have such firm,
unwavering grasps on their own worlds...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I would say the same for Agnes Digital, but she
doesn't seem very confident.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
No, no, I can't... I'm no more than a mere simp,
unworthy of coexisting on the same plane as
them.
choice_data_list: But your oshis are the ones asking for your help!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Y-you're right! What's my problem?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Straight to jail for me! Turning down a request
from one's oshi is an offense beyond redemption!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Such considerations have no place crossing a fan's
mind! The only course of action here is to accept
all requests!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I knew I was right in choosing you! What an open
mind you have!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Well, it would be an intriguing study to
observe you both performing an opera together...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Teehuehue... If my fangirly delusions can help out
my oshis, then I must accept this honor without
fear!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Agnes Digital spends a great many hours
both performing operas and being under
observation.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Gasp! Could it be that the depth of my love for my oshis is being tested here, in this very moment?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Causing my oshis trouble just because I can't
make up my mind is unacceptable! Inexcusable!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: It's a simp's job to have all her faves' schedules memorized!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Opera O, please let me stand under the spotlight
with you! We should be able to borrow the stage
this weekend!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, a fine idea! We'll certainly need one if we
are to entertain an audience!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Excellent! Not only are you a skilled playwright,
you even possess fantastic managerial skills!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Tachyon, since we share the same room, do you
think you could conduct your observations in
Ritto Dorm?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Are you suggesting I observe you as you observe
other Ritto residents? I see. A very reasonable
suggestion.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
And perhaps it will be me whom you decide to
observe... Heh. This is sure to be intriguing.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I will devote every fiber of my being to creating a
stupendous opera and incredible study results!
